from tests.test_pipeline import _find_fixture_pairs, _load_config_for, _match_notes
from core.audio_loader import load_audio
from core.transcriber import transcribe
from core.spectral_validator import spectral_validate
from core.midi_processor import process
from core.midi_exporter import build_midi
import pretty_midi

pairs = _find_fixture_pairs\(\)
for pair in pairs:
    meta = _load_config_for\(pair.name\)
    audio = load_audio\(pair.audio_path\)
    notes = transcribe\(audio,
        confidence_threshold=meta['confidence_threshold'],
        onset_threshold=meta.get\('onset_threshold', 0.5\),
        frame_threshold=meta.get\('frame_threshold', 0.3\),
        minimum_note_length_ms=meta.get\('minimum_note_length_ms', 58\),
    \)
    expected_midi = pretty_midi.PrettyMIDI\(str\(pair.midi_path\)\)
    exp_raw = []
    for inst in expected_midi.instruments:
        exp_raw.extend\(inst.notes\)
    expected_notes = sorted\(exp_raw, key=lambda n: \(n.start, n.pitch\)\)

    print\(f'--- {pair.name} ---'\)
    for label, do_val, do_rec, do_ovr in [
        \('baseline',           False, False, False\),
        \('recover-only',       False, True,  True\),
        \('validate-only',      True,  False, True\),
        \('full',               True,  True,  True\),
    ]:
        sv_notes = spectral_validate\(audio, notes,
            do_validate=do_val, do_recover=do_rec, do_resolve_overlaps=do_ovr\)
        proc = process\(sv_notes,
            bpm=meta['bpm'], note_low=meta['note_low'], note_high=meta['note_high'],
            do_filter_ghosts=meta['filter_ghost_notes'],
            dynamic_velocity=meta['dynamic_velocity'],
            preserve_durations=meta.get\('preserve_durations', True\),
            do_filter_harmonics=meta.get\('filter_harmonics', True\),
            harmonic_filter_mode=meta.get\('harmonic_filter_mode', 'adaptive'\),
            do_merge_fragments=meta.get\('merge_fragments', False\),
            fragment_gap_tol=meta.get\('fragment_gap_tol', 0.05\),
            fragment_reattack_ratio=meta.get\('fragment_reattack_ratio', 1.5\),
            timing_offset_grid=meta.get\('timing_offset_grid', 0.0\),
            do_fill_patterns=meta.get\('fill_patterns', False\),
            pattern_min_reps=meta.get\('pattern_min_reps', 4\),
            pattern_fill_threshold=meta.get\('pattern_fill_threshold', 0.75\),
        \)
        rm = build_midi\(proc, meta['bpm']\)
        rn = sorted\(rm.instruments[0].notes, key=lambda n: \(n.start, n.pitch\)\)
        m = _match_notes\(rn, expected_notes\)
        print\(f'  {label:18s}  det={m.total_detected:4d}  tp={m.true_positives:3d}  P={m.precision:.1%}  R={m.recall:.1%}  F1={m.f1:.1%}'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1 | grep -E "^---|  ")
